zh.Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德
zh.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pope III於1435年出生在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾時，他的父親George Henry Pope35歲，母親Joan Everard31歲。他於1459年與Mourning MacKinne在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1510年在英國哈普爾特易福德享年75歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德。

zh-hans.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Pope III于1435年出生在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾时，他的父亲George Henry Pope35岁，母亲Joan Everard31岁。他于1459年与Mourning MacKinne在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1510年在英国哈普爾特易福德享年75岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pope III was born in 1435, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, his father, George Henry Pope, was 35 and his mother, Joan Everard, was 31. He married Mourning MacKinne in 1459, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1510, in Twyford, Hampshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pope III est né en 1435, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, George Henry Pope, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Everard, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mourning MacKinne en 1459, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1510, à Twyford, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Pope III 1435 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Henry Pope 35 und seine Mutter Joan Everard 31. Er hat 1459 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England Mourning MacKinne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1510 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Twyford, Hampshire, England und wurde in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Pope III è nato il nel 1435 nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, George Henry Pope, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan Everard, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mourning MacKinne nel 1459, nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1510, nel Twyford, Hampshire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォード

ja.Twyford, Hampshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアトウイフォード
ja.lifeSummary: John Pope IIIが1435年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルで生まれた時，父George Henry Popeは35歳，母Joan Everardは31歳であった。1459年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルでMourning MacKinneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1510年にイギリスハンプシュアイアトウイフォードで75歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pope III(이)가 1435년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Henry Pope(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Everard(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 Mourning MacKinne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1510년 영국 함프실르 트w이퍼드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pope III nasceu em 1435, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Henry Pope, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Everard, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mourning MacKinne em 1459, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1510, em Twyford, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pope III родился в 1435 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени George Henry Pope было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Everard, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mourning MacKinne в 1459 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1510 г. в местности твифорд, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Pope III nació en 1435, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, George Henry Pope, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Everard, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mourning MacKinne en 1459, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1510, en Twyford, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
